data.name: My evil magician boss suddenly loves me?!
data.detailed_description:
An erotic dating sim set in a country ruled by beastmen, where magic power and upbringing determines your fate. You play as a mere human - your goal is to assist your half-beast childhood friend, Mirika, in proving her worth as successful magician & blacksmith.

Make your boss fall in love with you! Raise her affection level, aid her in studying intricacies of arcane theory, and help her become the best magic blacksmith in the capital.

Take on the role of workshop manager!  Acquire materials in dungeons, remove impurities from ore to smelt high-quality ingots, and learn new recipes to craft weapons!

  • Engaging Visual Storytelling: A hand-dawn, vivid fantasy, full of adventures & romance!

  • Date System: Go on dates with Mirika to earn her trust and affection and unlock special moments together.

  • Dressing Room: Choose clothes that Mirika can wear in sex scenes and romantic moments.

  • Various Mini-Games: Dungeon navigation, material refinement, and a crafting system!

data.short_description: Erotic dating sim with minigames! Play as the manager of a magic workshop! Explore dungeons, gather resources and forge weapons for sale. Make your boss fall for you and spoil her to bits by gifting her various outfits!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit OS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
